commands.name: init
commands.description: Initialize a project-local .projectIntelligence control plane without requiring the toolchain checkout.
commands.output: project-local control plane and configuration status

commands.name: accuracy-scorecard
commands.description: Run labeled messy-repo accuracy and regression scorecard.

commands.name: adopt
commands.description: One-command external repository adoption flow: doctor, semantic graph, fast check, and adoption report.

commands.name: capability-truth
commands.description: Run an executable capability truth audit across analyze/simulate/apply/replay/generalization pipelines.

commands.name: adoption-cockpit
commands.description: Generate terminal, JSON, Markdown, and HTML adoption cockpit report.

commands.name: ai-tool-research
commands.description: Render a versioned competitive pain-point study and map each gap to deterministic macro capabilities.
commands.output: AI coding tool research JSON and Markdown

commands.name: adoption-report
commands.description: Generate a repository adoption report with audit, semantic graph, score, benchmark, and competitive context.

commands.name: affected-check
commands.description: Run only checks affected by a changed-file list through deterministic impact selection.
commands.output: smart test runner JSON or summary

commands.name: artifact-cache
commands.description: Inspect or store shared content-addressed artifacts for scans, tests, simulations, and reports.

commands.name: audit
commands.description: Report source files not represented by struct component paths.

commands.name: autofix-plan
commands.description: Create a safe dry-run PR plan for policy-allowed low-risk macro improvements.

commands.name: autopilot
commands.description: Run phased adoption, semantic graph, scoring, macro synthesis, simulation, policy, and report flow.

commands.name: benchmark
commands.description: Run semantic plugin benchmark scorecard for parser accuracy, adoption quality, macro safety, and runtime readiness.

commands.name: benchmark-check
commands.description: Run benchmark validation shards through the smart runner.
commands.output: smart test runner JSON or summary

commands.name: codemod
commands.description: Run a simulate-first production codemod backend with idempotency and rollback metadata.

commands.name: commands
commands.description: List available wrapper commands and their metadata.
commands.output: human list or command manifest JSON

commands.name: competitive-scorecard
commands.description: Compare simple_model production capabilities against adjacent repository intelligence and codemod tools.

commands.name: confidence-plan
commands.description: Rank optimizer recommendations by evidence confidence, expected value, rollback cost, and dynamic risk.

commands.name: context-pack
commands.description: Compile task-specific Codex context packs from graph, score, policy, tests, and macro options.
commands.output: Codex context pack JSON and Markdown

commands.name: contracts
commands.description: Build contract graph from OpenAPI, GraphQL, gRPC, AsyncAPI, database, and event schema files.

commands.name: dashboard
commands.description: Generate a static Project Intelligence dashboard.

commands.name: deep-parser-probe
commands.description: Run deep parser backend probes and syntax evidence checks for the target repository.

commands.name: doctor
commands.description: Diagnose plugin, toolchain, and target repository readiness.

commands.name: dynamic-case-study
commands.description: Run the local dynamic governance case study and emit reproducible proof artifacts.
commands.output: dynamic case study JSON and Markdown reports

commands.name: dynamic-check
commands.description: Run dynamic governance test shards through the smart runner.
commands.output: smart test runner JSON or summary

commands.name: dynamic-edges
commands.description: Resolve dynamic surfaces into confidence-scored semantic graph edges.

commands.name: dynamic-merge
commands.description: Merge runtime observations into the dynamic surface graph and compute observed/probe-gap drift.

commands.name: dynamic-surface
commands.description: Extract runtime dynamic surfaces including routes, DI, plugins, event buses, env gates, generated code, reflection, imports, and unsafe mutation.

commands.name: external-eval
commands.description: Run safe local-only external repository adoption evaluation.

commands.name: facts
commands.description: Emit normalized code facts for a target repository.

commands.name: fast-check
commands.description: Run the fast deterministic validation shard through the smart runner and cache.
commands.output: smart test runner JSON or summary

commands.name: framework-resolvers
commands.description: Generate deterministic framework resolver pack metadata for dynamic governance.

commands.name: framework-surfaces

commands.name: full-check
commands.description: Run the full simple_model validation and test suite.

commands.name: index-cache
commands.description: Build incremental semantic index cache keyed by content, struct hash, and parser version.

commands.name: ingest
commands.description: Draft a struct model from an existing repository.

commands.name: interfaces
commands.description: Scan public interfaces and compare them with struct exports.

commands.name: lsp-symbols
commands.description: Discover optional LSP symbol indexing readiness and normalize workspace evidence.

commands.name: macro-advisor

commands.name: interface-stability

commands.name: macro-cockpit
commands.description: Generate macro cockpit JSON, Markdown, and HTML reports.

commands.name: macro-compose
commands.description: Analyze safe composition of macro operators.

commands.name: macro-drill

commands.name: macro-family-ranker
commands.description: Rank macro families by observed value, safety, maturity, and generality.

commands.name: macro-family-suggest
commands.description: Generate reusable macro families from repeated semantic findings.

commands.name: macro-gauntlet
commands.description: Run adversarial macro benchmark gauntlet.

commands.name: macro-generate
commands.description: Generate review-only macro candidates from repeated optimizer findings.

commands.name: macro-ledger
commands.description: Record macro outcomes in a local hash-linked ledger.

commands.name: macro-motifs

commands.name: macro-operator-ir
commands.description: Normalize macros into typed optimization operator IR.

commands.description: Search deterministic macro plans under value, risk, runtime, and rollback budgets.

commands.name: macro-preconditions
commands.description: Evaluate semantic, policy, dynamic, and test preconditions before macro apply.

commands.name: macro-promotion

commands.name: macro-proof-bundle

commands.name: macro-rank
commands.description: Rank generated macro candidates by expected value, risk, and confidence.

commands.name: macro-run

commands.name: macro-simulate
commands.description: Run macro plans in an isolated copy and report diffs, validations, score delta, and rollback feasibility.

commands.name: macro-suggest

commands.name: macro-templates
commands.description: Synthesize review-only macro templates from motif clusters.

commands.name: macro-transaction
commands.description: Simulate transactional macro plan execution with rollback and resume evidence.

commands.name: macros
commands.description: List deterministic code and execution macros available to the optimizer.

commands.description: Run one-command target repo onboarding with struct draft, audit, semantic graph, score, and context pack.

commands.description: Run score-driven macro suggestion, compilation, execution, validation, and rollback loop.

commands.name: optimizer-report
commands.description: Render evidence-rich optimizer explainability reports for selected and rejected candidates.

commands.name: optimizer-search
commands.description: Rank safe structural improvements from the Optimization Graph with deterministic decision traces.

commands.name: performance-v2

commands.name: parser-tiers

commands.name: performance-benchmark
commands.description: Generate performance scorecard for graph generation, test selection, cache reuse, and parallel validation.

commands.name: performance-dashboard

commands.name: release-slo
commands.description: Evaluate plugin release quality SLOs before publishing.
